auto.name: Auto
auto.description: Environment is inferred automatically from intent, studio override, time, weather, and branding constraints, prioritizing garment readability and narrative coherence.
auto.prompt_fragment: environment automatically inferred to match intent and photographic constraints

minimal_studio_cyclorama.name: Minimal studio cyclorama
minimal_studio_cyclorama.description: Clean seamless studio background with infinite curve, designed to remove all environmental distractions and maximize garment, fit, and silhouette readability.
minimal_studio_cyclorama.prompt_fragment: set against a minimal seamless studio cyclorama with an infinite clean background

high_key_studio.name: High key studio
high_key_studio.description: Bright studio environment with white surfaces and high reflectance, producing an airy, commercial, and highly legible look.
high_key_studio.prompt_fragment: shot in a high-key studio environment with bright white surfaces

dark_editorial_studio.name: Dark editorial studio
dark_editorial_studio.description: Controlled dark studio space used for luxury editorials, emphasizing contrast, texture, and sculptural lighting.
dark_editorial_studio.prompt_fragment: set in a dark editorial studio environment with controlled shadows

industrial_loft.name: Industrial loft
industrial_loft.description: Converted industrial interior with exposed brick, concrete floors, and metal beams, offering texture without overpowering the subject.
industrial_loft.prompt_fragment: inside an industrial loft with exposed brick, concrete, and steel elements
